mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement: Where your needs come before all else."

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So there I was, strolling into my favorite coffee shop like the VIP I am, when I noticed they were out of my usual almond milk. Naturally, I demanded to speak with the manager, who clearly didn't understand the magnitude of my lactose intolerance. I proceeded to throw a fit worthy of an Oscar, informing them I wouldn't leave until they flew in fresh almond milk from the coast of Spain. And you know what? They did it. The lengths people will go to accommodate a man of my stature-it's truly inspiring.
